meta.name: Operation NORTHSTORM onboarding
meta.description: CTFd-only Start Here content for Polaris participants

challenges.name: Start Here — Kali Warm-Up
challenges.description: Before you touch Boreas, orient yourself on the Kali box. Find the helper script that submits flags to CTFd and submit its filename wrapped in the standard flag format.
challenges.connection_info: This warm-up uses the Kali box only. Read `/home/kali/README.md` or inspect `/home/kali/tools`.

hints.content: The answer is on the Kali box itself. Read `/home/kali/README.md` or list the files in `/home/kali/tools`.
The helper script is `/home/kali/tools/flag_submit.sh`, so the expected submission is `FLAG{flag_submit.sh}`.
